name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug or broken parser
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug

---

**Site URL**
The URL of the page where the bug occurs:

**What happened?**
A clear description of the bug.

**What did you expect?**
What should have happened instead.

**Browser & OS**
- Browser: (e.g., Chrome 120, Arc, Brave)
- OS: (e.g., macOS 15, Windows 11)

**Screenshots**
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain the problem.
